pages.text: The $(bold)Frequency System$() lets you "name" Importers and Exporters for easy identification in the PreFab GUI.$(br2)Without it, gates show as "Importer (abc-123)".$(br2)With it, they show as "Coal Importer" or "Iron Ingot Exporter".

pages.title: How to Set Frequency
pages.text: $(bold)1.$() Hold any item (e.g., Coal)$(br2)$(bold)2.$() Right-click an Importer or Exporter$(br2)$(bold)3.$() The gate is now "named" after that item.$(br2)$(italic)The item is not consumed - you keep it.$()

pages.title: Example Usage
pages.text: $(bold)For a furnace setup:$()$(br2)Right-click Importer #1 with Coal$(br)→ "Coal Importer"$(br2)Right-click Importer #2 with Iron Ore$(br)→ "Iron Ore Importer"$(br2)Right-click Exporter with Iron Ingot$(br)→ "Iron Ingot Exporter"

pages.title: Best Practices
pages.text: $(bold)Set frequencies BEFORE configuring PreFab faces.$()$(br2)Recommended workflow:$(li)Place all Importers/Exporters$(li)Name each with frequency system$(li)Exit CM dimension$(li)Configure PreFab (dropdown shows clear names)
